# EXPOZOR

> EXPOZOR is a waitlist-stage personal expense tracking and organization product for individuals and households.

EXPOZOR currently operates a public waitlist site. The current product positioning is manual expense tracking first, with receipt upload, CSV import, mobile apps, exports, and AI-assisted categorization described only as planned or early-access features unless launched later.

**EXPOZOR is not a bank, financial institution, payment processor, money transmitter, lender, investment adviser, or tax adviser. It does not connect to bank accounts, collect bank credentials, initiate payments, custody funds, or provide financial advice.**

## Current status

- Waitlist-only public site
- Manual expense tracking positioning
- No active billing
- No active payment processor
- No confirmed AI/OCR provider
- No analytics provider currently active in the codebase
- Waitlist data is the current concrete data flow

## Planned product areas

- Manual transaction entry
- Receipt upload and scanning
- CSV import from files users choose to provide
- AI-assisted categorization with user review
- Budget tracking and spending summaries
- Manual shared household expense notes
- Mobile apps
- Data download and reporting tools
